name: Elder 2 Door Cabinet Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Keep your home orderly and organized with the beautiful addition of this Elder 2-Door Cabinet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Made with rubberwood and designed with clean lines, this storage cabinet features slatted detailing on the doors for textured charm. It's designed with doors and built-in shelves to give you ample space for your books and other items, and the top of the cabinet provides additional display space for books, a lamp and more.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 38.125 inches
Overall Height: 30.25 inches
Overall Depth: 15.75 inches
Distance from floor to bottom panel: 6.375 inches
Thickness of top panel: 1.25 inches
Width of door: 15.625 inches
Height of door: 25.5 inches
